single_causal_variable: adverse next-open gap-down entry cancel threshold
hypothesis: Canceling entries whose next open is modestly below signal entry may remove low-MFE stopouts without touching signal generation or exits.

parameters.baseline: existing high-gap cancel plus stop-breach cancel
